Package com.airtribe.meditrack.entity

Class Bill

java.lang.Object
com.airtribe.meditrack.entity.Bill
All Implemented Interfaces:
Payable, Searchable, Serializable
public class Bill extends Object implements Searchable, Payable, Serializable
Bill entity with Strategy pattern implementation. Supports multiple billing calculation strategies.
